raw_consumer_statement: I made a hotel reservation through XXXX for XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. I cancelled the reservation within XXXX hours. I made the charge on my Luzury Card ( which is a XXXX ). I disputed the charge and Luxury Carg gave the refund but later the charge was added back to my card. I called them and asked why. They said that XXXX disputed the refund but if i obtained further information they would open the dispute. So I contacted XXXX whom said in writing that they would give the refund if the hotel approved the refund. XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX approvced the refund to XXXX twice. I have those emails. XXXX then confirmed through email that they would submit the refund. I provided that information to Luxury Card ( emails uploaded to their system ). I called Luxury Card several times to ask why the refund was not showing on my account. Today when I called them they said yes, we see the documentatio you provided but XXXX says that I am not entitled to the refund. I feel that I am getting the run around from both Luxury Card and XXXX...
